description.content: Browse available data in the CWMS catalog
Returns a catalog of available time series, locations, or other data stored in CWMS. Use this endpoint to discover available data.

query.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
Number of results to return per page (max 500)
Three-character USACE district office code (e.g., SWT, LRN)
Filter results using a CWMS wildcard pattern

variable.description: (Required) The type of data to catalog (TIMESERIES, LOCATIONS, RATINGS, etc.)

description.content: USACE location data including dams, reservoirs, streamgages, and sites
Returns location data for USACE-managed sites including dams, reservoirs, stream gages, and other water resource facilities.

query.description: Comma-separated list of location names (supports CWMS wildcards)
Measurement unit system (EN for English, SI for metric)
Vertical datum for elevation values (NAVD88, NGVD29, etc.)

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Time series data retrieval and management
Returns time series data for a specified time window. Time series data includes measurements such as river stage, flow, precipitation, temperature, and reservoir pool elevation over time.

query.description: (Required) The time series identifier in CWMS format (e.g., DALT2.Stage.Inst.15Minutes.0.raw)
Measurement unit for the returned data
Start of time window in ISO 8601 format or milliseconds since epoch
End of time window in ISO 8601 format or milliseconds since epoch
Pagination cursor from a previous response
Number of time series values per page

response.name: Bad request — invalid parameters or missing required fields
The requested resource was not found

description.content: Returns the most recent time series values. Useful for displaying current conditions at USACE locations.

query.description: ISO 8601 duration for how recently the data was updated (e.g., PT2H for 2 hours)

description.content: Returns filtered time series data based on specified criteria.
Location levels and stage-discharge relationships
Returns time series for a specified location level.

query.description: Start of time window in ISO 8601 format
End of time window in ISO 8601 format

description.content: Returns location levels (flood stage, normal pool, etc.) for USACE locations.
Rating tables for converting between measured values
Returns rating tables used to convert between measured values (e.g., stage to flow, gate opening to discharge).

response.name: Bad request — invalid parameters or missing required fields

description.content: Forecast instances and specifications
Returns forecast specifications available in the CWMS system.

query.description: Mask for filtering forecast spec IDs (supports wildcards)

description.content: Returns forecast instances with time series data.

query.description: Forecast issue date in ISO 8601 format
Date forecast was issued in ISO 8601 format

description.content: USACE project management including locks, gates, turbines, and outlets
Returns USACE water resource projects (dams, locks, reservoirs).
River basin information
Returns river basin information for USACE water management areas.
Physical parameters and units
Returns the list of physical parameters available in the CWMS system (e.g., Stage, Flow, Precip, Temp).
Returns the list of measurement units available in the CWMS system.
API version information
Returns a welcome message confirming the API is available.
Returns the current version of the CWMS Data API.

The Corps Water Management System (CWMS) Data API provides a RESTful interface for accessing water management data from the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers. This includes time series data, locations, levels, ratings, forecasts, projects, turbines, gates, and water supply information for USACE-managed water resources across the United States.
